final:
// // This module implements a convolutional encoder with a constraint length of 3 and two output bits for every input bit. It uses a polynomial representation of (7, 5) in octal notation. The input is a single bit stream, and the output is a two-bit encoded stream. The encoder maintains state across clock cycles.
module convolutional_encoder (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input data_in,
    output reg [1:0] data_out
);
    reg [2:0] shift_reg; // 3-bit shift register for the encoder

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            shift_reg <= 3'b000;
            data_out <= 2'b00;
        end else begin
            shift_reg <= {data_in, shift_reg[2:1]}; // Shift in the new data
            data_out <= {shift_reg[2] ^ shift_reg[1] ^ shift_reg[0], // Output 1
                          shift_reg[2] ^ shift_reg[0]}; // Output 2
        end
    end
endmodule
